since_last: 53% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.27%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.63% · BTC +0.32% · Gold +0.86% · Nasdaq100 -0.77%. 53% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.27%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.27%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.96%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -13.17%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +6.58%, LEU +5.79%, MU +4.34%, ARM +3.58%, HPE +3.32%. Laggards: ISRG -13.17%, PUBM -5.36%, SPCX -4.02%, BIDU -3.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.02% at $125.84
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.02% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
